summary: Run a Quick Start automated scan safely and review the alerts.
starter:
# Use Quick Start UI to launch the scan
# Record the URL, spider choice, and top alerts
objectives: Launch an automated scan from Quick Start.
solutionOutline: Scan completed with the selected spider option.
Alerts reviewed and summarized by risk.
title: Lab 23: Quick Start Automated Scan (Iteration 3)
steps: Open Quick Start and select Automated Scan.
Enter the target URL you have permission to test.
Select traditional or AJAX spider based on the app.
Launch the scan and wait for completion.
Review alerts and note top risks.
overview:
## Goal
Run a Quick Start automated scan safely and review the alerts.
